topic: The one event-production secret most companies get wrong
hook: Most companies spend 80% of their budget on the venue and forget the one thing people actually remember.
script_he: רוב החברות מוציאות 80% מהתקציב על הוונו ושוכחות את מה שאנשים באמת זוכרים. לא הנברשות. לא הקייטרינג. הרגע. הרגע שבו מישהו הרגיש משהו — הפתעה, גאווה, חיבור. ב-UPE יצרנו מעל 1,500 אירועים ב-130 יעדים ברחבי העולם, ואנחנו יודעים שהפרודקשן הכי טוב הוא זה שאתה לא רואה — זה שגורם לך להרגיש. אם אתם בונים אירוע עכשיו ועדיין לא שאלתם 'מה הרגע שייצרב לאנשים בזיכרון?' — כתבו לנו.
script_en: Most companies spend 80% of their budget on the venue and forget the one thing people actually remember. Not the chandeliers. Not the catering. The moment. The moment someone felt something — surprise, pride, connection. At UPE we've produced over 1,500 events across 130+ destinations for 25,000+ participants, and the best production is always the one you never see — the one that makes you feel. If you're planning an event right now and haven't asked yourself 'what's the moment people will never forget?' — DM us. That's where we start.
captions: 80% on the venue. 0% on the moment. 🚨
post_caption:
Your guests won't remember the florals. They'll remember the moment that gave them chills. ✨ After 1,500+ events across 130+ destinations, we've learned that the most powerful production is invisible — it just makes people feel something. Are you designing experiences or just filling rooms? 👇 Tell us your next event challenge.

#CorporateEvents #EventProduction #IncentiveTravel #HRLeaders #ExperienceDesign #B2BEvents
scene: Sofia stands in a warmly lit boutique hotel terrace at golden hour — Mediterranean stone walls, candlelit tables being set in the background, soft ambient sounds of an event coming to life around her, casual-elegant, no crew visible.
